title: justicia angusta
intro: Justicia angusta, also known as the narrow justicia or narrow leaved justicia, is a plant species in the Acanthaceae family, native to tropical regions. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are attributed to its bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Justicia angusta include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate respiratory issues, and provide relief from various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Justicia angusta can be found in the form of teas, infusions, and tinctures, often used in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine practices.
